title: List dependencies for Ubuntu / apt
body: Please could you list the dependencies for an Ubuntu / apt-based repo in the readme?

comments.body:
@alexellis Are you talking about the stuff we have to build buildah?
Travis has
```
    - sudo add-apt-repository -y ppa:duggan/bats
    - sudo apt-get -qq update
    - sudo apt-get -qq install bats btrfs-tools git libapparmor-dev libdevmapper-dev libglib2.0-dev libgpgme11-dev libselinux1-dev
    - sudo apt-get -qq remove libseccomp2
```
Yes - the bootstrap, so `dnf` is mentioned on the README front page, but coming from a background working mainly with Ubuntu it might help interest if it was updated to show instructions for both.

This is obviously missing the point of the project - but it might also be worth adding a Dockerfile that documents the complete build - is repeatable and testable and can be run easily by MacOS users to evaluate the project without having to install a Linux VM.
Open a pull request for what you would like to see.  Also please review 244, to tell me if it works.
Thanks! It'll be a few days if you can wait.
i think this should probably be closed, considering #244 is merged and #354 is pending.
